name: @intentsolutionsio/regression-test-tracker
description: Track and run regression tests to ensure new changes don't break existing functionality

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install regression-test-tracker\\n  or /plugin install regression-test-tracker@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
